title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 116.280 - Paper ballots for statewide measures, form
text:
116.280.  Paper ballots for statewide measures, form. — In jurisdictions using paper ballots, election authorities shall cause the ballots for statewide ballot measures to be printed on paper not less than four inches wide and ten inches long, and all in the same color and size.  Measures may be printed in more than one column.
(L. 1980 S.B. 658) 
Effective 1-01-81
